ShowerOutletType.description: Hot water type for this shower outlet.

ShowerFlowRate.description: The flow rate. Only when a shower is not instantaneous electric. Leave blank if NO flow limiter fitted.

ShowerPower.description: The shower power, only if shower outlet type is instantaneous electric.

ShowerWWHRS.description: The WWHRS with which the shower is connected. If shower outlet type is instantaneous electric shower then only a storage WWHRS can be selected or none.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
